user_task_description: This one-page PDF has mismatched accent colors and uneven callout alignment.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Apply a cohesive blue-gray theme to the callout boxes and align the three callout boxes into one evenly spaced horizontal row beneath the title.
atomic_scope: Only the callout theming and alignment are explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .pdf page with aligned callout boxes and a cohesive blue-gray theme.

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
- Do not change the callout text
- Leave the title text unchanged
